mapper.select:
SELECT course_id as courseId, c.title, s.period, c.professor, u.name AS professorName, s.status FROM test_schedule s INNER JOIN course c using(course_id) INNER JOIN tb_userinfo u ON (c.professor = u.loginID) WHERE 1=1
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY s.date DESC,1,3 LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_schedule s INNER JOIN course c using (course_id) WHERE 1=1
AND c.professor LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT td.course_id AS courseId, c.title AS courseName, td.period, ts.title AS testName, td.question_no AS questionNo, td.content, td.option1, td.option2, td.option3, td.option4, td.answer, td.score, td.comment FROM test_detail td JOIN course c on (td.course_id = c.course_id) JOIN test_schedule ts on (td.course_id = ts.course_id AND td.period = ts.period) WHERE td.course_id = #{courseId} AND td.period = #{period} ORDER BY td.question_no
mapper.update: UPDATE test_detail SET content = #{content}, option1 = #{option1}, option2 = #{option2}, option3 = #{option3}, option4 = #{option4}, answer = #{answer}, score = #{score}, comment = #{comment} WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND period = #{period} AND question_no = #{questionNo}
mapper.select: SELECT ts.course_id AS courseId, ts.period, ts.status FROM test_schedule ts WHERE ts.course_id = #{courseId} AND ts.period = #{period}
